mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gangwon.sys_board_test02 (BBS_MASTER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, ATCH_FILE_ID, NOTICE_YN, INS_DT, UPD_DT, HIT) VALUES('', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE gangwon.sys_board_test02 SET BBS_MASTER_ID='', TITLE=NULL, CONTENT=NULL, ATCH_FILE_ID=NULL, NOTICE_YN=NULL, INS_DT=SYSDATE, UPD_DT=SYSDATE, HIT=0 WHERE SEQ=0
